untranslatable_reason: Abandoned Baby candlestick pattern detection requires multi-candle formation analysis (3-candle pattern with specific gap and body characteristics) that cannot be expressed with single-bar price/indicator conditions. Measure rule divisor selection (6 vs 3) is context-dependent on breakout direction which requires pattern state tracking. Volume performance clues reference external lookup table (Table 6.4) not quantifiable as inline rules.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally a multi-candle pattern recognition rule that requires: (1) Detection of 3-candle Abandoned Baby formation (bullish candle, gap down, small body, gap up), (2) Dynamic measure rule based on breakout direction post-pattern. Regime-dependent behavior noted: 69% reversal success in bull markets, 52% continuation success in bear markets. No single-bar indicators can replicate the pattern identification logic. Recommend implementing as custom pattern detector in backtest engine rather than rule-based conditions.
